calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
David Mendez, Esq. for and with Plaintiff B.D. Thakor
Andrew Catterall, Esq. for and with Defendant Mohamed M. Salameh
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation for entry of judgment on the record, with parties agreeing that Judgment be entered in favor of Plaintiff.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 56 Mason Street #320, San Francisco. Stayed of execution until April 30, 2004. Defendant owes Plaintiff the sum of $2,000.00 back rent and per diem damages. Each party waives claim against the other. Each party to bear their own costs and attorney fees. Forfeiture of the rental agreement. Defendant warrants that no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession, waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture. Any items left at the premises shall be deemed abandoned. Upon compliance by Defendant, Plaintiff shall file a Satisfaction of Judgment.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
